"filled": len(market) - len(missing),

def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="免费晨报生成器：Yahoo主搜 + DuckDuckGo兜底")
    parser.add_argument("--output", required=True, help="markdown 输出路径")
    parser.add_argument("--json-output", help="json 输出路径")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    news = choose_key_news(search_news())
    market = fetch_market_snapshot()
    news = synthesize_market_dimension_news(news, market)
    temp = fetch_a_share_temp()
    sector = fetch_sector_map()
    md = render_markdown(market, temp, sector, news)
    out_path = Path(args.output)
    out_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    out_path.write_text(md, encoding="utf-8")

    if args.json_output:
        j = render_json(market, temp, sector, news)
        Path(args.json_output).write_text(json.dumps(j, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

    print(out_path)
    if args.json_output:
        print(args.json_output)
    return 0
